hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ]; then exit 0; fi; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE_PATH"); case "$BASENAME" in .env|users.json|*.pem|*.key) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files" >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.env.*|*credentials*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git add (-A|--all|\\.)$|^git add .* (-A|--all)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never use git add -A/. — always add specific files by name" >&2; exit 2; fi; for PAT in ".env" "users.json" "credentials" ".pem" ".key"; do case "$CMD" in *"$PAT"*) case "$CMD" in *cat*|*less*|*head*|*tail*|*grep*|*echo*) ;; *) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files via shell" >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac; done; if [ "${HOOK_PROFILE:-standard}" != "minimal" ]; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\\[CD\\]|\\[Donna\\]|\\[Marko\\]|\\[auto\\]"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must contain [CD], [Donna], [Marko], or [auto] prefix" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); LOGDIR=".claude"; mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"; echo "$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | $CLAUDE_TOOL | $FILE_PATH" >> "$LOGDIR/change-log.txt"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.js|*.mjs) if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node --check "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "SYNTAX WARNING: $FILE_PATH has errors" >&2; fi;; esac; exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "[hook] Context compacted — re-read WORK_PLAN.md for current task status" >&2; exit 0'

Stop.command: bash -c 'L=".claude/memory/session-learnings.md"; mkdir -p ".claude/memory"; B=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "?"); C=$(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo "no commits"); D=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1); echo "" >> "$L"; echo "### $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | $B" >> "$L"; echo "- Last: $C" >> "$L"; [ -n "$D" ] && echo "- Pending: $D" >> "$L"; exit 0'
